content.text:
Two clear problems from the build log:

1. **No `plantuml` binary installed on RTD.** Your `conf.py` uses `sphinxcontrib.plantuml` with `plantuml_output_format = "svg"`, but `.readthedocs.yaml` doesn't install `plantuml` (or a JRE) via `apt_packages`. With ~30 PlantUML directives across the docs, that's almost certainly why the build hit the **15-minute timeout** (build length = 901s, last command exit_code = None = killed).

2. **Sphinx 9.1.0 gets pulled in** because RTD runs `pip install --upgrade sphinx` *before* installing your project, and your `pyproject.toml` only pins `sphinx>=4.0`. Sphinx 9 is brand-new and not all of `sphinx-needs 8.1.1` / `sphinx-immaterial 0.13.9` / `sphinx-need-svg` may be compatible yet.

Suggested fix — minimal `.readthedocs.yaml` patch:

```yaml
version: 2
build:
  os: ubuntu-22.04
  tools:
    python: "3.12"
  apt_packages:
    - plantuml
    - default-jre-headless
sphinx:
  configuration: docs/conf.py
  fail_on_warning: true
python:
  install:
    - method: pip
      path: .
      extra_requirements:
        - docs
```

And cap Sphinx in `pyproject.toml`:
```toml
dependencies = [
  "sphinx>=4.0,<8",
  "sphinx-needs>=1.0",
  ...
]
```

Also worth fixing while we're here:
- `pyproject.toml` advertises `Documentation = "https://sphinxcontrib-sysml.readthedocs.io/"` but the actual RTD slug is `sphinx-need-sysml` — that URL 404s. Either rename the RTD project or update the URL.
- `conf.py` has `repo_url: "https://github.com/user/sphinxcontrib-sysml"` (placeholder `user`).

Want me to apply these three changes?

content.text:
Worth considering — the naming is currently inconsistent across three layers:

| layer | name |
|---|---|
| GitHub repo | `sphinx-need-sysml` |
| sibling project | `sphinx-need-svg` |
| RTD slug | `sphinx-need-sysml` |
| **PyPI package** | `sphinxcontrib-sysml` (0.2.4, 4 releases) |
| **Python module** | `sphinxcontrib.sysml` |
| advertised docs URL | `sphinxcontrib-sysml.readthedocs.io` (404) |

My recommendation: **rename to `sphinx-need-sysml`** to match the repo and the `sphinx-need-svg` sibling. The `sphinxcontrib.*` namespace is a convention, not a requirement, and the family naming will be much clearer for users (`pip install sphinx-need-svg sphinx-need-sysml`).

Main tradeoff: it's a breaking change. You'd need to:
1. Rename PyPI package (`sphinx-need-sysml` is free) → bump to 0.3.0 / 0.4.0
2. Rename Python module (`sphinxcontrib/sysml/` → `sphinx_need_sysml/`) — users' `extensions = ["sphinxcontrib.sysml"]` becomes `extensions = ["sphinx_need_sysml"]`
3. Leave a deprecation shim or just orphan the old PyPI name (it only has 4 releases, low blast radius)

Lower-effort alternative: keep `sphinxcontrib-sysml` and just rename the RTD project slug to match — but you'd still be diverging from the `sphinx-need-svg` sibling.

Which way do you want to go?

readme = "README.rst"
license = { file = "LICENSE" }
authors = [{ name = "cpolzer", email = "coders@hai-fai.de" }]
classifiers = [
  "Framework :: Sphinx",
  "Framework :: Sphinx :: Extension",
  "Development Status :: 2 - Pre-Alpha",
  "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
  "Operating System :: OS Independent",
  "Programming Language :: Python",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
  "Topic :: Documentation",
]
keywords = ["sphinx", "sysml", "sysml-v2", "plantuml", "sphinx-needs"]
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
  "sphinx>=4.0",
  "sphinx-needs>=1.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "pytest>=7.0",
  "pytest-cov",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg>=0.3.1",
  "Pillow",
]
docs = [
  "sphinx-immaterial",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg>=0.3.1",
  "Pillow",
]

[dependency-groups]
dev = [
  "pre-commit~=3.0",
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "mypy>=1.16.0",

  "commitizen",
  "detect-secrets",
]

[tool.flit.module]
name = "sphinxcontrib.sysml"

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/cpolzer/sphinx-need-sysml"

Documentation = "https://sphinxcontrib-sysml.readthedocs.io/"

[tool.ruff.lint]
extend-select = [
  "B",
  "C4",
  "FURB",
  "I",
  "ICN",
  "ISC",
  "N",
  "PERF",
  "PGH",
  "PIE",
  "SLF",
]

[tool.mypy]
packages = ["sphinxcontrib.sysml"]
strict = true
show_error_codes = true

disallow_subclassing_any = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]

ignore_missing_imports = true

[tool.ruff]
target-version = "py310"
exclude = ["*.rst"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

name = "cz_conventional_commits"
version = "0.3.0"
version_files = [

31	
32	CI order: **lint → test → docs-build**. All must pass on PRs.
33	
34	## Architecture
35	
36	- **Package**: `sphinx_need_sysml/` — namespace package (no `sphinxcontrib/__init__.py`)
37	- **Build**: flit (`[tool.flit.module] name = "sphinx_need_sysml"`)
38	- **Entry point**: `sphinx_need_sysml/__init__.py` → `setup(app)`
39	- **Registration flow**: `config-inited` event registers need types + fields via `add_need_type` / `add_field` with `add_extra_option` fallback shim
40	- **Flow configs**: merged into `needs_flow_configs` at `builder-inited`; user keys take precedence
41	- **Diagram directives**: each wraps `NeedumlDirective` with a config key + Jinja2 template from `templates.py`
42	- **SVG path**: `needsysml-bdd-svg` uses `sphinx_need_svg.jinja_context.render_jinja_svg`, registered only when `sphinx_need_svg` is importable (`_HAS_NEED_SVG` flag)
43	
44	## Key Gotchas
45	
46	- **No `sphinxcontrib/__init__.py`** — relies on implicit namespace packages. Creating one breaks the install.
47	- **`needs_id_regex`** — default sphinx-needs regex rejects hyphenated IDs like `PD-001`. Test projects need `needs_id_regex = "^[A-Z0-9_-]+"`.
48	- **`needs_fields`** (sphinx-needs ≥ 6) expects a dict, not a list. Don't set it in test conf.py unless needed.
49	- **`_needs_all_needs`** — sphinx-needs stores needs on `env._needs_all_needs` (private attr). Tests use `# noqa: SLF001`.
50	- **PlantUML not required** — extension works without it; diagrams emit warnings but don't break the build.
51	- **Template `{root_id}` replacement** — `BDD_FULL_TEMPLATE` and `IBD_FULL_TEMPLATE` use `{root_id}` as a literal string placeholder (not Jinja), replaced via `.replace()` before passing to needuml.
52	
53	## Test Structure
54	
55	- `tests/doc_test/basic/` — minimal project with all 14 need types + 3 diagram directives
56	- `tests/doc_test/full_example/` — vehicle system example with all diagram types + SVG directive
57	- Fixtures use `sphinx.testing.fixtures` plugin; `make_app` + `app.build()` is the standard pattern
58	- Test matrix: Python 3.10–3.12 × Sphinx 5.0/7.2.5/8.1.3 × sphinx-needs 2.1–8.0.0 (via nox)
59	
60	## Release
61	
62	- Version in `pyproject.toml` and `sphinx_need_sysml/__init__.py:VERSION`
63	- `cz bump` (commitizen) auto-bumps on push to main if conventional commits warrant it

[build-system]
requires = ["flit_core >=3.4,<4"]
build-backend = "flit_core.buildapi"

[project]
name = "sphinx-need-sysml"
version = "0.3.0"
description = "Sphinx extension for SysML v2 need types and diagrams via sphinx-needs and PlantUML"
readme = "README.rst"
license = { file = "LICENSE" }
authors = [{ name = "cpolzer", email = "coders@hai-fai.de" }]
classifiers = [
  "Framework :: Sphinx",
  "Framework :: Sphinx :: Extension",
  "Development Status :: 2 - Pre-Alpha",
  "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
  "Operating System :: OS Independent",
  "Programming Language :: Python",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
  "Topic :: Documentation",
]
keywords = ["sphinx", "sysml", "sysml-v2", "plantuml", "sphinx-needs"]
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
  "sphinx>=4.0",
  "sphinx-needs>=1.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "pytest>=7.0",
  "pytest-cov",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg>=0.3.1",
  "Pillow",
]
docs = [
  "sphinx-immaterial",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg>=0.3.1",
  "Pillow",
]

[dependency-groups]
dev = [
  "pre-commit~=3.0",
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "mypy>=1.16.0",
  "ruff>=0.4.0",
  "commitizen",
  "detect-secrets",
]

[tool.flit.module]
name = "sphinx_need_sysml"

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/cpolzer/sphinx-need-sysml"
Repository = "https://github.com/cpolzer/sphinx-need-sysml.git"
Documentation = "https://sphinx-need-sysml.readthedocs.io/"

[tool.ruff.lint]
extend-select = [
  "B",
  "C4",
  "FURB",
  "I",
  "ICN",
  "ISC",
  "N",
  "PERF",
  "PGH",
  "PIE",
  "SLF",
]

[tool.mypy]
packages = ["sphinx_need_sysml"]
strict = true
show_error_codes = true
disallow_any_generics = true
disallow_subclassing_any = true
disallow_untyped_calls = true
disallow_untyped_defs = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]
module = [
  "sphinx_needs",
  "sphinx_needs.*",
  "docutils",
  "docutils.*",
  "sphinx_need_svg",
  "sphinx_need_svg.*",
]
ignore_missing_imports = true

[tool.ruff]
target-version = "py310"
exclude = ["*.rst"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

[tool.commitizen]
name = "cz_conventional_commits"
version = "0.3.0"
version_files = [
  "pyproject.toml:^version",
  "sphinx_need_sysml/__init__.py:VERSION",
]
tag_format = "v$version"
update_changelog_on_bump = true
changelog_file = "CHANGELOG.md"

cd /home/chris/develop/open_source/sphinx-need-sysml
echo "=== README.rst ==="
grep -n -E "pip install|extensions|sphinx_need_sysml|sysml" README.rst | head -30
echo "=== docs/install.rst ==="
grep -n -E "pip install|extensions|sphinx_need_sysml" docs/install.rst | head -20
echo "=== docs/conf.py extensions ==="
grep -n "extensions" docs/conf.py
sed -n '8,16p' docs/conf.py

[build-system]
requires = ["flit_core >=3.4,<4"]
build-backend = "flit_core.buildapi"

[project]
name = "sphinx-need-sysml"
version = "0.3.0"
description = "Sphinx extension for SysML v2 need types and diagrams via sphinx-needs and PlantUML"
readme = "README.rst"
license = { file = "LICENSE" }
authors = [{ name = "cpolzer", email = "coders@hai-fai.de" }]
classifiers = [
  "Framework :: Sphinx",
  "Framework :: Sphinx :: Extension",
  "Development Status :: 2 - Pre-Alpha",
  "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
  "Operating System :: OS Independent",
  "Programming Language :: Python",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
  "Topic :: Documentation",
]
keywords = ["sphinx", "sysml", "sysml-v2", "plantuml", "sphinx-needs"]
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
  "sphinx>=4.0",
  "sphinx-needs>=1.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "pytest>=7.0",
  "pytest-cov",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg>=0.3.1",
  "Pillow",
]
docs = [
  "sphinx-immaterial",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg>=0.3.1",
  "Pillow",
]

[dependency-groups]
dev = [
  "pre-commit~=3.0",
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "mypy>=1.16.0",
  "ruff>=0.4.0",
  "commitizen",
  "detect-secrets",
]

[tool.flit.module]
name = "sphinx_need_sysml"

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/cpolzer/sphinx-need-sysml"
Repository = "https://github.com/cpolzer/sphinx-need-sysml.git"
Documentation = "https://sphinx-need-sysml.readthedocs.io/"

[tool.ruff.lint]
extend-select = [
  "B",
  "C4",
  "FURB",
  "I",
  "ICN",
  "ISC",
  "N",
  "PERF",
  "PGH",
  "PIE",
  "SLF",
]

[tool.mypy]
packages = ["sphinx_need_sysml"]
strict = true
show_error_codes = true
disallow_any_generics = true
disallow_subclassing_any = true
disallow_untyped_calls = true
disallow_untyped_defs = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]
module = [
  "sphinx_needs",
  "sphinx_needs.*",
  "docutils",
  "docutils.*",
  "sphinx_need_svg",
  "sphinx_need_svg.*",
]
ignore_missing_imports = true

[tool.ruff]
target-version = "py310"
exclude = ["*.rst"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

[tool.commitizen]
name = "cz_conventional_commits"
version = "0.3.0"
version_files = [
  "pyproject.toml:^version",
  "sphinx_need_sysml/__init__.py:VERSION",
]
tag_format = "v$version"
update_changelog_on_bump = true
changelog_file = "CHANGELOG.md"
